summary: Dashboard displays correctly with proper empty state messaging, billing estimate, usage tracking, and navigation. Minor palette drift from manifesto diner aesthetic in authenticated UI surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses neutral gray/beige palette instead of the diner teal (#9fd8d2) and cream (#fff8ea) brand palette established for public surfaces

actions: Consider applying consistent brand palette from public surfaces to authenticated dashboard
Verify billing estimate display logic matches backend data availability
Confirm mobile drawer navigation remains accessible at narrow viewports
